title: Osmium Resourcepack
description: Dark red PvP resource pack for Minecraft 1.21.11 with a clean Crystal PvP style and custom GUI based on PvP Zegarn by the original creator.
body:
# 📦 Osmium Red Resource Pack

Osmium Red is a dark red PvP resource pack for Minecraft Java Edition 1.21.11, designed for Crystal PvP and competitive gameplay. The pack combines a modern black/red aesthetic with clean textures, smooth GUI elements, and optimized visuals to create a stylish but practical PvP experience.

The goal of this pack is to keep Minecraft looking dark, clean, and aggressive without ruining visibility during fights. Many textures were redesigned to fit a premium PvP style inspired by modern clients and competitive Crystal PvP packs.

## ✨ Features

* Dark red & black themed textures
* Custom PvP GUI
* Clean hotbar & inventory
* Crystal PvP styled items
* Smooth crosshair & HUD
* Better visibility during combat
* Optimized for fast gameplay
* Minimalistic modern design
* Minecraft 1.21.11 support

## 🎮 Recommended For

* Crystal PvP
* SMP PvP
* Lifesteal servers
* Competitive gameplay
* Dark themed client setups

## ❤️ Credits

This resource pack is partially based on / inspired by PvP Zegarn by the original creator.

🔗 https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pvp-zegarn

Please support the original creator.

## ⚠ Important

* Made for Minecraft Java Edition 1.21.11
* Best used with PvP clients
* Some textures may be modified or inspired by existing PvP packs
* Do not redistribute without permission
